div.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: #000; line-height: 1.25;
border-color: #000 !important; align-items: center;
font-size: 14px; color: #505050; margin-top: 4px;
margin-bottom: 12px;

table.style: font-size: 9px; width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important; table-layout: fixed;

th.style: padding: 6px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 800; font-size: 9.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; color: #222; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
padding: 6px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 800; font-size: 9.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; color: #222; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
padding: 6px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 800; font-size: 9.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; color: #222; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;

div.style: padding: 6px 8px; overflow-wrap: anywhere; word-break: break-word;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 42%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; font-weight: 600; overflow-wrap: anywhere; word-break: break-word;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 42%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 42%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed;
display: table-cell; width: 42%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 45%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 45%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; width: 45%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600;
display: table; width: 100%; table-layout: fixed;
display: table-cell; width: 45%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border-right: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
display: table-cell; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600;
margin-top: 14px; margin-bottom: 5px; width: 100%; page-break-inside: avoid;

span.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #222;

table.style: width: 100%; font-size: 9px; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed;

div.style: font-size: 9px; color: #999; font-style: italic; padding: 6px 0;

t.div: Sin material recibido registrado en la recepción.

div.style: margin-top: 14px; margin-bottom: 5px; width: 100%; page-break-inside: avoid;

span.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #222;

table.style: font-size: 9px; width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important; table-layout: fixed; margin-bottom: 8px;

td.style: width: 18%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
width: 18%; padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;
padding: 5px 8px; color: #555; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 8.5px; background-color: #f2f2f2; border: 1px solid #d8d8d8 !important;

div.style: border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; padding: 8px; background-color: #fafafa; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 9.5px; line-height: 1.35;
margin-top: 14px; margin-bottom: 5px; width: 100%; page-break-inside: avoid;

span.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #222;

div.style: margin-bottom: 10px; page-break-inside: avoid;
border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; border-radius: 3px; padding: 6px;
font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px;
font-size: 8.5px; color: #6b7280;
margin-top: 14px; margin-bottom: 5px; width: 100%; page-break-inside: avoid;

span.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #222;

div.style: border: 1px solid #d8d8d8; padding: 8px; background-color: #fafafa; white-space: pre-line; font-size: 9.5px; line-height: 1.35;
margin-top: 45px; width: 100%; page-break-inside: avoid;
border-top: 1px solid #000; padding-top: 5px;
border-top: 1px solid #000; padding-top: 5px;
